EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not delete a notification or multiple notifications on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} deleted a notification or multiple notifications on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not change a notification on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} could not create a notification on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
